'''Nikohler Elee''' was a member of the Galactic Radicals organization who was affiliated with the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] bounty hunter, [[Boozoo Boga|"Bogey" Boga]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1stm}}
